title: polystichum aculeatum var. setosum
intro: Polystichum aculeatum var. setosum, also known as the scaly shield fern, is a variety of the Polystichum aculeatum species, a type of evergreen fern native to East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The scaly shield fern is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and protecting against cancer. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being dried and used in traditional Chinese medicine.
